announcement.message: Aap business badhayein, hum funding sambhalte hain.

meta.title: NavDhan — Business Loans for India's MSMEs
meta.description: Get ₹5L to ₹1Cr business loans from trusted lenders. One application, multiple offers, zero platform fee.

hero.eyebrow: Fast business loans for India's MSMEs
hero.headline: Get the right business loan, without chasing banks.
hero.body: NavDhan helps small and growing businesses find fair, fast loans from trusted lenders. One application. Multiple offers. Zero platform fee.

ecosystemTicker.heading: Built on a trusted technology ecosystem

loanProducts.heading: A loan for the real things your business needs.
loanProducts.body: From buying stock and machinery to managing daily expenses — choose the loan that fits your plan, not the other way around.

products.descriptionKey: Unsecured funding up to ₹1 Crore based on your business cash flow. No property or asset needed.
Cover salaries, stock, supplier payments, or everyday gaps with flexible repayment.
Buy equipment, vehicles, or tools with EMIs that match your cash cycle.
Larger-ticket capital to expand to a new city, add capacity, or take on bigger orders.

whyNavdhan.heading: Built for business owners, not paperwork collectors.
whyNavdhan.body: You are running a business, not a bank branch. We keep the process digital, transparent, and focused on getting you an offer that works.

reasons.bodyKey: Apply once and see offers from several trusted lenders side by side.
From ₹5 Lakhs to ₹1 Crore, borrow what your business actually needs.
Rates from 12% to 24% p.a., with all costs explained upfront.
Approvals typically within 24 hours to 7 days, depending on documents.
Submit documents and e-sign from your phone or laptop.
You pay only what the lender charges. Nothing extra to NavDhan.

recognition.heading: Trusted by lenders. Recognised by the industry.

emi.heading: Plan your monthly outgo before you apply.
emi.intro: Move the sliders to see an estimate. Your final rate will depend on your business profile, lender, and tenure.

finalCta.heading: The right loan for your business is a few clicks away.
finalCta.subtext: Zero platform fee · Multiple lender offers · Quick, transparent process

meta.title: Our Team — NavDhan
meta.description: Meet the people building fair, fast business loans for India's MSMEs.

hero.heading: Built by people who believe MSMEs deserve better credit.
hero.subtext: We are a team of operators, engineers, and bankers working to make business funding calm, clear, and accessible.

join.heading: Want to shape the future of MSME credit?
join.subtext: We are always looking for thoughtful people who care about Indian businesses.
